metrics.name: Governance integrity & liveness
metrics.desc:
Price: ~$4.00
Max supply: 1,000,000,000
Total supply: 898,378,420 (90%)
Circulating supply: 633,561,603 (63%)
Delegated voting power: 222M (24% of total supply)
Proposal threshold: 1M UNI ($4M)
Quorum: 40M UNI (18% of delegated voting power)
Top 5 delegate concentration: 57M (6.3% of TS, 25% of DVP)
Top 10 delegate concentration: 95M (10.5% of TS, 43% of DVP)
Quorum hit rate over last 20 proposals: 18
Vote duration: 6 days
Proposal delay: 2 days

metrics.name: Governance integrity & liveness
metrics.desc:
Liveness looks strong: quorum hit 18/20 is excellent.
Quorum is non-trivial: ~18% of delegated voting power.
Vote timelock parameters give time for delegates to react.
Delegated voting power is low: 24% of total supply — low participation can make governance more political and easier to swing.
Concentration is meaningful at top 10: 43% of delegated voting power. A relatively small coalition can decide outcomes if they coordinate.

metrics.name: Control-plane integrity
metrics.desc:
Number of privileged roles: 0
Separation of duties: The DAO handles everything
Pausable: No
Upgradeable: No
Timelock delay: 2 to 30 days
Timelock bypass allowed: No

metrics.name: Control-plane integrity
metrics.desc:
No privileged roles, no timelock bypass.
Not pausable.
Not upgradeable.

Flash-loan resistance: Yes — checkpointed token balances

metrics.name: Voting power integrity

metrics.name: Voting mechanism integrity
metrics.desc:
Mechanism: Governor Bravo
Known past governance exploits or mitigations: None. Audited by OpenZeppelin.
Execution lifecycle: proposal → voting → queue → execute

metrics.name: Voting mechanism integrity
metrics.desc: Governor Bravo is audited (OpenZeppelin) and no known past governance exploits.

metrics.name: Governance parameters safeguards
metrics.desc:
Which path changes governance parameters: Timelock contract only.
Is it harder than normal proposals: No — all proposals go through the same path.

metrics.name: Governance parameters safeguards
metrics.desc: Governance parameter changes are not harder than normal proposals — a captured governance can more easily entrench itself.

metrics.desc:
